# List

A component for rendering ordered or unordered lists with optional custom indicators.

## Import

```jsx
import { List, ListItem, ListIndicator } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `List` | The root list container. |
| `ListItem` | An individual list item. |
| `ListIndicator` | A custom indicator (icon or element) for list items. |

## Props

### List

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `as` | `"ul" \| "ol"` | `"ul"` | The HTML element type for the list. |
| `gap` | `string \| number` | - | The spacing between list items. |

## Usage

### Unordered List

```jsx
<List>
  <ListItem>First item</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Second item</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Third item</ListItem>
</List>
```

### Ordered List

```jsx
<List as="ol">
  <ListItem>Step one</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Step two</ListItem>
  <ListItem>Step three</ListItem>
</List>
```

### List with Custom Indicators

```jsx
import { LuCheck } from "react-icons/lu";

<List gap="2">
  <ListItem>
    <ListIndicator asChild color="green.500">
      <LuCheck />
    </ListIndicator>
    Feature included
  </ListItem>
  <ListItem>
    <ListIndicator asChild color="green.500">
      <LuCheck />
    </ListIndicator>
    Another feature
  </ListItem>
</List>
```
